title: assessment.submitted payload (v1)
description: Emitted when a candidate submits an assessment attempt (before grading finalizes). Producer: assessment-service public-take submit route (apps/assessment-service/src/routes/public-take.ts). Notify-only; no subscriber consumes this subject today. Carries NO grade/score (grading may still be pending).

pendingManualReview.description: True when the attempt has open-ended items or otherwise needs a human grade before a verdict.
